title: pentacalia retroflexa
intro: Pentacalia retroflexa is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pentacalia retroflexa include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Pentacalia retroflexa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
